headline.title: Amazon is already offering new OpenAI products on AWS
headline.summary: A day after OpenAI got Microsoft to agree to end exclusive rights, AWS announced a slate of OpenAI model offerings, including a new agent service.

headline.title: Google expands Pentagon’s access to its AI after Anthropic’s refusal
headline.summary: After Anthropic refused to allow the DoD to use its AI for domestic mass surveillance and autonomous weapons, Google has signed a new contract with the department.

headline.title: OpenAI ends Microsoft legal peril over its $50B Amazon deal
headline.summary: OpenAI has won major concessions from its largest shareholder, Microsoft, that will allow it to sell products on AWS, while Microsoft gets more cash in a revenue-share agreement.

headline.title: OpenAI models, Codex, and Managed Agents come to AWS
headline.summary: OpenAI GPT models, Codex, and Managed Agents are now available on AWS, enabling enterprises to build secure AI in their AWS environments.
